primary_sponsor.name: Walrus
primary_sponsor.primitive: Walrus Publisher/Aggregator durable blob storage plus Sui object metadata for proof inspection
primary_sponsor.score_reason: The public action does not complete until the Memory Will is written to Walrus and then read back before successor output. Removing Walrus turns the product into a local chat handoff and breaks the visible restore outcome.

core_user_action: Click Kill Agent, scope allowed memory, write the Memory Will, and open a cold successor.
visible_outcome: The successor resumes from approved memory only, and the receipt shows Walrus/Sui identifiers, redactions, replay trace, and output hash.
removal_breaks: Without Walrus the user cannot prove that a cold successor restored from durable scoped memory rather than hidden local state or a pasted summary.

non_primary_sponsors.name: Sui
non_primary_sponsors.role: Supporting proof layer for Walrus object metadata inspection
non_primary_sponsors.why_not_primary: The prize target is Special - Walrus; Sui proof supports the receipt but is not the winning thesis.

judge_sentence: Walrus write/read -> killed-agent memory succession -> receipt and cold successor restore
